name: Saint John the Apostle (the Evangelist)
date_died: circa 100 (the only apostle traditionally believed to have died of natural causes)

approving_authority: biblical (Apostle to the Apostles); ancient cult; feast elevated to a Feast by Pope Francis (2016)
patronage: converts; penitents; women; pharmacists; hairdressers; against sexual temptation

name: Saint Martha

name: Saint Stephen the Protomartyr
city: Jerusalem (martyred); relics later in Rome (San Lorenzo fuori le mura)

name: Saint Agnes of Rome

approving_authority: ancient cult (early virgin-martyr; named in the Roman Canon)

name: Saint Lucy of Syracuse
city: Syracuse (martyrdom); relics venerated in Venice (San Geremia)
approving_authority: ancient cult (named in the Roman Canon)
patronage: the blind; eyes; eye disease; writers; the city of Syracuse; Sweden (Lucia tradition)

name: Saint Monica
city: Ostia (died); relics in Rome (Sant'Agostino in Campo Marzio)
feast_day: August 27 (the day before her son Augustine's feast)
patronage: mothers; wives; abuse victims; alcoholics; difficult marriages; conversion of relatives

name: Saint Christopher
city: traditional martyrdom in Lycia, Asia Minor
approving_authority: ancient cult; demoted from the universal Roman Calendar but retained in the Roman Martyrology and approved for local veneration
feast_day: July 25 (in the Roman Martyrology and many local calendars)
patronage: travelers; drivers; ferrymen; against storms; against epilepsy
